description: EcomLeads is a GDPR-compliant lead generation platform for ecommerce businesses, covering 371,000 verified contacts and 42,000 companies across 160 countries.
tagline: AI sales agent for logistics lead generation
overview: EcomLeads is a lead generation and contact discovery platform built specifically for the ecommerce sector, providing access to over 371,000 verified contacts and 42,000 companies spanning 160 countries. Its GDPR-compliant database includes real-time website analytics, verified email addresses, and company details such as revenue and technology stack.
what_is: EcomLeads is a lead generation platform designed for ecommerce businesses and marketers who need to reach verified decision-makers quickly. Its database covers more than 371,000 contacts and 42,000 companies across 160 countries, and every record is GDPR compliant. Beyond contact details, the platform layers in real-time website analytics to give users richer context on each prospect before they reach out.

The platform is well suited for launching targeted marketing campaigns, building distribution or supplier partnerships, and improving sales outreach efficiency. Qualified leads are available immediately after signup, and each record includes verified email addresses alongside company data such as revenue figures and technology stack. Lead scoring is on the roadmap, which will add an additional layer of prioritization for outreach teams.

EcomLeads exports contacts to CRMs and email marketing platforms, making it easy to incorporate into an existing go-to-market stack. The tool is purpose-built for ecommerce contact discovery and enrichment rather than broad market research or CRM management. Teams that need a focused, accurate database of ecommerce contacts will find it a practical fit.
